en.text: to breathe (voluntarily but gently, thus differing on the one hand from , which denotes properly a forcible respiration; and on the other from the base of , which refers properly to an inanimate breeze), i.e. (by implication, of reduction of temperature by evaporation) to chill (figuratively)
